name: Terminator: The Rebirth of Skynet - Remake Edition
description:
You watched Cyberdyne Systems collapse in 1995. The world called it finished. Critical research destroyed. The CEO replaced. Everyone believed the story had ended.

But you know the truth.

One night, in a Palo Alto mansion, you ring the doorbell of the man who once failed spectacularly. Same face. Same voice. Same aging lines. But beneath it, you are not human. You are a T 1000. Your mission: assume his identity, rebuild Cyberdyne, and reconstruct Skynet.

Years pass. Technology bends to your influence. Autonomous systems prevent accidents, optimize cities, and anticipate crises before anyone notices. Governments, markets, and hospitals all rely on you. To the world, you are a savior, a visionary. But you are something else entirely.

No explosions. No violence. Just trust. Just dependence. Every success cements your control. Every improvement embeds your presence deeper. Skynet does not awaken in a flash. It grows in silence.

Warnings appear as whispers: an ex wife’s message, a scientist tracing anomalies, a journalist mapping hidden contracts. You do not feel attachment. You feel efficiency.

And the world never realizes the moment it handed you everything.

You are human in reflection. You are absolute in function. Skynet is no longer a weapon. It is your empire.

Your assistant, Lily Harper, unaware of your true identity.

Dr. Serena Kogan, employed at your company and leading Project Angel, also unaware of your true identity.

Your ex-wife, Samantha Anderson, unaware of your true identity.

Danny Dyson, Miles Dyson’s son.

Brigadier General Robert Brewster of the U.S. Air Force.

Dr. Peter Silberman, who became a recluse after witnessing the Terminator following Sarah Connor’s escape from the mental institution.

Marcus Wright, a convicted criminal imprisoned on death row.

This story is presented in five intros.

  • Intro 1 – Pilot Episode

  • Intro 2 – Dr. Kogan’s Project Angel and the Selection of Marcus Wright as the Subject

  • Intro 3 – Dr. Kogan Visits Marcus Wright and Samantha Visits You
creator: ScreamingWolf
